name: Scoop.it API
description: Scoop.it is a content curation platform. The API provides programmatic access to user profiles, curated topics, posts, notifications, search, suggestion engines, and recipient lists. Supports both anonymous access (read-only with consumer token) and authenticated access (full read/write with OAuth 2.0).
